subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! A spiritual letter hath been composed and dispatched in your name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء امه الله روحانی مکتوبی از لسان شما انشا نموده و ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
